question: Will Anthropic make Claude Mythos broadly available before July 1, 2026?
reason: Anthropic's Claude Mythos remains restricted to select partners, with no public release announced.
evidence: As of May 22, 2026, Anthropic stated it looks forward to making Mythos-class models available through a general release once it has developed stronger safeguards, but explicitly conditioned that on work that has not yet been completed. ([techtimes.com](https://www.techtimes.com/articles/317076/20260524/anthropic-moves-closer-public-claude-mythos-release-10000-critical-bugs-found-first.htm?utm_source=openai))

Access to Claude Mythos is currently limited to Project Glasswing partners, a set of organizations focused on defensive cybersecurity. ([mythos.one](https://mythos.one/me/brianswichkow/bc0112?utm_source=openai))

Independent analysts estimate limited enterprise access no earlier than late 2026, with broader availability in 2027 or later. ([techtimes.com](https://www.techtimes.com/articles/317076/20260524/anthropic-moves-closer-public-claude-mythos-release-10000-critical-bugs-found-first.htm?utm_source=openai))
